calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-11-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-11-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Daniel Stern, Esq. for for Plaintiff: Down Brrs., a Meridan Management.
Plaintiff's Witness: Mandy Ho, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Marsha Kelly and Defaulted Defendant: Cathy Wing.
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 36 Laskie, San Francisco.
Plaintiff waived money damages.
Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DANIEL STERN, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF DOWD BROS., A MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP CO. (COMPANY REPRESENTATIVE GIL DOWD IS ALSO PRESENT IN COURT). DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT IN COURT.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR DUE TO THE NON APPEARANCE OF THE DEFENDANT. TRIAL DATE REMAINS. JURY TRIAL IS NOT STRICKEN.

JUDGE: VJ OLLIE MARIE-VICTORRE, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED (218).
